title: 1981-04-16_Pat_125.txt
key_claims: *Flow My Tears* was written by Thomas, to be read by the inhabitants of the *other* coaxial realm (Christ's Kingdom). The steganographic (hidden) story within the novel is specifically meant for the "secret Christians" operating there.

Dick had a hypnagogic vision of a growing vascular network (like a vine or mycelium) penetrating our reality. He realizes this living information *is* the Plasmate, which *is* Christ (the True Vine/Corpus Christi).

Dick states his life's monumental task: not just claiming that two coaxial worlds exist, but constructing a rational, theoretical metaphysics (akin to Plato's Theory of Forms) to explain *how* they can coexist in the same space-time.

The fundamental difference between the two realms is their overarching law: the ostensible world operates on Lex Talionis (retributive justice/Karma/Torah), while Christ's Kingdom operates on Mercy and Agape.
recurring_concepts: **Set/Ground Discrimination**: The perceptual act of separating the newer, highly complex, negentropic structure (Christ's Kingdom/Set) from the background noise of the older, lower-energy reality (The BIP/Ground).
reading_excerpt: *Flow My Tears* was written by Thomas, to be read by the inhabitants of the *other* coaxial realm (Christ's Kingdom). The steganographic (hidden) story within the novel is specifically meant for the "secret Christians" operating there.
